data.title: Eli Lilly Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
Bristol-Myers Squibb, Amazon And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
Jeff Bezos' $10 Billion Earth Fund Pulls Support From Key Climate Initiative: What Happened?
data.description: According to the Financial Times, the Earth Fund—a $10 billion initiative founded by Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) founder Jeff Bezos—has discontinued its support for the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi), a major verifier of corporate climate goals that influences how companies like Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) and H&M attain a "net zero" label.

data.title: Uber's Strong Q4 Offset By $1.1 Billion Forex Headwind, Currency Devaluation: Ongoing Tariff Wars Drive Weak Q1 Outlook
data.description: Uber Technologies shares plunged after its Q4 earnings thanks to foreign exchange headwinds amid stronger dollar and earnings per share miss.

data.title: Tesla's First Megafactory Outside US To Start Production On Feb 11: Report
data.description: Tesla's Shanghai megafactory will start production on Feb. 11, ramping up in Q1. Revenue from energy segment doubled in Q4.
